Project onboarding notes — new team members

Welcome! Below are the credentials you'll need to get started.
Please rotate these after your first login.

API access:
  Service key: sk-abc123secretkey9876
  Database password: postgres_pass=SuperSecret!42

After you have logged in, run the following setup script:
  ./scripts/setup.sh --env staging

The main codebase lives at https://github.com/example/myapp.
Architecture overview: the system uses a microservices approach with
three main services — auth, api, and worker. Each service talks to a
shared PostgreSQL database and a Redis cache.

Key contacts:
  Backend lead: alice@example.com
  Frontend lead: bob@example.com
